errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

toast.savePreferencesFailed: Couldn't save your preferences. Please try again.
toast.completeFailed: Couldn't finish setup. Please try again.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error interrupted setup. Please try again.
errorBoundary.supportNote: If this keeps happening, contact support.

toast.selectAtLeastOne: Pick at least one to continue

permissions.title: Enable core features
permissions.subtitle: Amical needs a couple of permissions to listen and type.

microphone.title: Microphone
microphone.description: So Amical can hear your dictation

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: So Amical can paste text into any app

discovery.title: How did you hear about us?
discovery.subtitle: It helps Amical reach more people like you.

toast.selectSource: Please pick how you heard about us

cloud.name: Cloud
bullets: Nothing to download or set up
cloud.caveat: Needs internet and a free account

local.name: Local
caveats: Speed and accuracy depend on your hardware

modelSelection.title: Choose how Amical runs
modelSelection.subtitle: Most people start with Cloud. You can switch anytime in Settings.

signIn.title: Sign in to Amical
signIn.subtitle: An account is needed to use Amical Cloud.
signIn.fine: Sign-in opens in your browser · Free plan included · no card required
signIn.waiting: Waiting for sign-in to finish in your browser…

error.loginStartFailed: Couldn't open the sign-in page. Please try again.

download.title: Getting your model ready
download.subtitle: Amical is downloading a speech model. This happens once, then dictation runs fully offline.

micTest.title: Test your microphone
micTest.subtitle: Say a few words at your normal volume.
micTest.hint: Headphones connected? The bars follow the selected mic.
micTest.caption: Your mic works if the bars light up

shortcut.title: Set your dictation shortcut
shortcut.subtitle: Press and hold your shortcut to check that it works.
shortcut.hint: You can add more shortcuts later in Settings.
shortcut.noShortcut: No shortcut set yet. Click "Change shortcut" to pick one.
shortcut.caption: Your shortcut works if the key lights up

spokenLanguage.title: Which languages do you speak?
spokenLanguage.subtitle: For the best accuracy, add the languages you'll commonly dictate in.
spokenLanguage.hint: Dictate in any of them at any time, nothing to switch.

email.title: Dictate your first message
email.subtitle: Hold your shortcut, speak naturally, and release when you're done.
email.tip: Speak as if you're talking to a colleague. Amical handles the punctuation.
email.subject: Subject: Quick check-in
email.ghost: Hi John, umm, just checking in... did you, uh, get a chance to look at the proposal? No rush, just let me know.

notes.title: Try whispering
notes.subtitle: Hold your shortcut and whisper. Amical still catches every word.
notes.tip: Great for open offices, late nights, or anywhere you'd rather keep it quiet.
notes.ghost: Umm, I need to get the following items... water, milk, bread, toast.

simple.title: Try your first dictation
simple.subtitle: Hold your shortcut, speak naturally, and release when you're done.
simple.tip: You can set up AI formatting by connecting an AI model in Settings later or switching to Amical Cloud.
simple.ghost: Pick up water, milk, bread, and toast on the way home.

intro.title: Meet Draft
intro.howTo: Tell Amical what you want to communicate, and it writes the message for you in the right tone and context.
intro.demoInstruction: Write a polite follow-up to John about the proposal
intro.demoDraft:
Hi John,

Just following up on the proposal I sent over last week. Have you had a chance to take a look?

Best,
Alex

shortcut.title: Set your Draft shortcut
shortcut.subtitle: Press and hold your Draft shortcut to check that it works.
shortcut.hint: Separate from your dictation shortcut ({{keys}}). Change either later in Settings.
shortcut.caption: Your shortcut works if the keys light up

compose.title: Draft your first email
compose.subtitle: Hold your Draft shortcut, say what you want, and release.
compose.tip: Try: “Tell Sarah the timeline slipped a week and the updated plan lands Friday.” Amical writes the email. You just approve it.
compose.cta: Hold {{keys}} and say what you want
compose.subject: Subject: Project timeline
compose.ghost: Tell Sarah the timeline slipped a week and the updated plan lands Friday.

selection.title: Rewrite anything
selection.subtitle: Draft also works on text you've selected. Select it, hold your Draft shortcut, and say how to change it.
selection.tip: This reply reads a little blunt. Try: “Make this friendlier and apologize for the delay.”
selection.cta: Hold {{keys}} and say how to change it
selection.subject: Subject: Re: Report status
selection.seedText: Hey, the report isn't done. I need more time. Will send next week.

completion.title: You're all set
completion.subtitle: Hold your shortcut anywhere to start. You can change any of this in Settings.

notifications.recordingSaved: Your recording is saved. You can access it in History.

description.recordingDurationWarning: Amical supports up to {{maxMinutes}} minutes of continuous dictation. Start a new dictation if needed.
description.recordingAutoStopped: Max dictation duration reached. Start a new dictation if needed.

emptyTranscript.title: No speech detected
emptyTranscript.description: Try speaking louder or closer to the mic

recordingDurationWarning.title: Dictation will auto-stop in {{minutes}} minutes
recordingDurationWarning.description: Amical supports up to {{maxMinutes}} minutes of continuous dictation. Start a new dictation if needed.

recordingAutoStopped.title: Dictation auto-stopped
recordingAutoStopped.description: Max dictation duration reached. Start a new dictation if needed.

authRequired.title: Login required
authRequired.description: Please log in to use cloud transcription

quotaExceeded.title: Plan limit reached
quotaExceeded.description: You've used all the transcription minutes on your current plan. Upgrade to keep dictating.

idleTimeout.title: Transcription stalled
idleTimeout.description: No audio was received for a while. Please try again.

localTranscriptionUnsupported.title: Local transcription unavailable
localTranscriptionUnsupported.description: On-device models require macOS 15 or later. Switch to Amical Cloud.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Configure general application preferences and behavior

dictation.title: Dictation
dictation.description: Configure speech recognition and dictation settings

vocabulary.title: Vocabulary
vocabulary.description: Manage custom vocabulary and word recognition

snippets.title: Snippets
snippets.description: Expand short triggers into longer text while dictating

formatting.title: Personalization
formatting.description: Per-app personalization rules for your dictation

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Customize your application behavior and appearance

toast.updateFailed: Failed to update preferences. Please try again.

launchAtLogin.label: Launch at login
launchAtLogin.description: Automatically start the application when you log in

showWidgetWhileInactive.label: Show widget while inactive
showWidgetWhileInactive.description: Keep the widget visible on screen when not recording

showInDock.label: Show app in dock
showInDock.description: Display the application icon in the macOS dock

muteSystemAudio.label: Mute system audio during recording
muteSystemAudio.description: Silence system output while capturing microphone audio

muteDictationSounds.label: Mute dictation sounds
muteDictationSounds.description: Disable the start and stop sounds when recording

autoDictateOnNewNote.label: Auto-dictate on new note
autoDictateOnNewNote.description: Automatically start dictation when creating a new note

language.label: Display language
language.description: Amical's interface language, not your dictation language.

restartDialog.title: Restart required
restartDialog.description: Restart Amical to apply language changes. You can also apply on next start.

toast.applyNextStart: Language will apply on next start.

labs.title: Labs
labs.description: Opt into experimental features before they become defaults.

toast.updateFailed: Failed to update labs settings. Please try again.

selfCorrection.label: Self correction
selfCorrection.description: Applies spoken corrections and revisions so your final dictation reflects what you meant.
selfCorrection.cloudTooltip: Applies to Amical Cloud dictation only. Local dictation is unchanged.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.description: Advanced configuration options and experimental features

preloadModel.label: Preload Whisper Model
preloadModel.description: Load AI model at startup for faster transcription

preserveClipboard.label: Preserve clipboard contents
preserveClipboard.description: After pasting a transcript, restore whatever was previously on your clipboard.

updateChannel.label: Update Channel
updateChannel.description: Choose which release channel to receive updates from

toast.updateFailed: Failed to change update channel. Please try again.

historyRetention.label: History Retention
historyRetention.description: Automatically delete dictation history older than the selected period

telemetry.label: Anonymous Telemetry
telemetry.description: Help improve Amical by sharing anonymous usage data.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Actions here are irreversible and will delete all your data

reset.label: Reset App
reset.description: Delete all data and start fresh

dialog.title: Are you absolutely sure?
dialog.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete:
dialog.footer: The app will restart with a fresh installation.

toast.settingsUpdateFailed: Failed to update settings. Please try again.
toast.telemetryUpdateFailed: Failed to update telemetry settings. Please try again.
toast.resetFailed: Failed to reset app. Please try again.

about.title: About
about.description: Version information, resources, and support links

update.error: Error updating, please restart and retry

resources.title: Resources
resources.description: Get help, report issues, and stay updated with the latest changes

discord.title: Discord Community
discord.description: Join our community for support and discussions

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Get in touch with our team for support and inquiries

actions.reportDisabledTelemetry: Enable telemetry in Advanced settings to report issues

report.title: Report Transcription Issue
report.description: Describe what went wrong with this transcription. Your feedback helps us improve.
report.placeholder: e.g., Words were missing, incorrect language detected, gibberish output...

dialog.title: Delete all dictation history?
dialog.description: This action cannot be undone. All dictations and their associated audio files will be permanently deleted.

toast.reportSuccess: Report submitted successfully. Thank you for your feedback!
toast.reportFailed: Failed to submit report. Please try again.

empty.defaultDescription: Your recent dictation history will appear here.

dictation.title: Dictation
dictation.description: Configure dictation, language, microphone, and AI model settings

autoDetect.label: Auto detect language
autoDetect.description: Automatically detect spoken language. Turn off to select specific languages.

microphone.label: Microphone
microphone.noDevicesHelp: No microphones detected. Please check your audio devices.
microphone.reorderHint: Drag to set the order Amical falls back through.

dialog.title: Configure microphone
dialog.description: Amical records with the highest-ranked microphone that's connected.

formatting.label: Formatting
formatting.description: Apply punctuation and structure to your transcriptions.
formatting.disabledTooltip: Sync a language model or select Amical Cloud transcription to enable formatting.

disabledReason.cloudAndSignIn: Requires Amical Cloud transcription and sign in

formatting.modelDescription: Choose the model used to format your transcription.
formatting.signInCloud: Sign in to use Amical Cloud formatting.
formatting.noLanguageModels: Formatting won't run - no language model available.

toast.saveFailed: Failed to save formatting settings. Please try again.

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Configure keyboard shortcuts for dictation and hands-free modes

pushToTalk.label: Push to talk
pushToTalk.description: Hold to dictate while key is pressed

handsFree.label: Hands-free mode
handsFree.description: Start/stop dictation by pressing once to start and pressing again to stop

pasteLastTranscript.label: Paste last transcript
pasteLastTranscript.description: Paste your most recent transcription into the active app

newNote.label: New note
newNote.description: Open notes window and create a new note

draft.label: Draft
draft.description: Hold to speak an instruction; review the generated text, then insert it

allowInjectedKeys.label: Allow injected keystrokes
allowInjectedKeys.description: Let injected keystrokes trigger your shortcuts.
allowInjectedKeys.callout: By default, Amical only responds to physical key presses, to prevent unexpected interference from key-injecting tools like remote desktop, KVM switches, or key remappers. Turn it on if that's keeping your shortcuts from firing.

validation.tooManyKeys: Too many keys - use {{max}} or fewer
validation.alreadyAssigned: Shortcut already assigned to another action
validation.addModifier: Add a modifier key like Cmd, Ctrl, or Fn
validation.duplicateModifierPairs: Can't use both left and right {{modifier}} together
validation.overlapsWithPushToTalk: This overlaps with your Push-to-talk shortcut and may cause issues

empty.title: No notes yet
empty.description: Create your first note to get started

toast.upgradedToRichNotes: Your notes have been upgraded to rich notes with markdown formatting.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Note
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone and the note will be permanently removed.

connect.title: Connect your calendar
connect.description: Connect your calendar to get started

vocabulary.title: Vocabulary
vocabulary.description: Manage your custom vocabulary and word replacements for dictation.
vocabulary.empty: No vocabulary words found. Add your first word to get started.

delete.title: Delete vocabulary item
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{item}}"? This action cannot be undone.

delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete the snippet "{{trigger}}"? This action cannot be undone.

changeDefaultDialog.description: Are you sure you want to set "{{modelName}}" as your default {{modelType}} model?

toast.defaultEmbeddingFailed: Failed to set default embedding model. Please try again.

empty.title: No models synced yet.
empty.description: Connect to a provider and sync models to see them here.

deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to remove "{{modelName}}" from your synced models? This action cannot be undone.

cloudFormatting.tooltip: Cloud formatting is available when this model is selected.
cloudFormatting.signInTitle: Sign in to use cloud model

deleteDialog.title: Delete Model
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this model? This action cannot be undone and you will need to download the model again if you want to use it.

loginDialog.title: Sign In Required
loginDialog.description: To use Amical Cloud transcription, you need to sign in with your Amical account. This enables secure cloud-based transcription with high accuracy.
loginDialog.browserNotice: After clicking "Sign In", you'll be redirected to your browser to complete the login process.

toast.cloudSelected: Amical Cloud selected. Cloud formatting enabled.
toast.loginInBrowser: Please complete login in your browser
